programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex is back and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and Rev Bem help a peaceful society stand up to their would-be slavers. They have to be careful because if Dylan teaches them to kill, their kids will be born knowing it.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka takes the Andromeda to Tarn-Vedra, but extended time in the slipstream causes side effects. To combat them, Beka starts taking Flash and soon becomes addicted.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An old memory from the Andromeda is accidentally activated, which sends her on a mission and leaves Dylan and the crew unable to override the command.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: With the Andromeda damaged by their deadliest enemies, Dylan and Rommie must rescue Tyr, Harper, and Rev from a Magog World ship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Mark Hill continue their search for money making treasures. Some Victorian anatomy molds and a 200-year-old Regency ornament go under the gavel.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Mark Hill cruise around East Anglia on a search for treasures from a bygone era, and find a rare blue duck, sought-after Hungarian porcelain, a penny farthing and some pretty earrings.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Fens, Irita Marriott uncovers something so gold and gaudy that it might not sell, and Mark Hill falls head-over-heels for a very stylish, and shiny, mid-century kitchen appliance. Plus, a collectible with a very gruesome history.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final chance for Mark Hill and Irita Marriott's to buy profit-making collectibles, but will a shoe shaped pin cushion or a 1970s motorbike sell for the most at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer sets off in a vintage Volvo with new rival, Ishy Khan. They compete to find profitable antiques in the Lakes, with Izzie buying a broken but rare piece of silver and Ishy making a remarkable discovery next to a coffee machine.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and new recruit, Ishy Khan, head for the Pennines. Ishy picks up an iridescent alligator for just a few pounds while Izzie goes for jewelry and a very, very long Victorian ruler.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Ishy Khan explore Yorkshire in their vintage Volvo. Will a very old and rare padlock be key to an auction win? Plus, a trip to a spa and the story of a woman who played a part in setting up schools around the world.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Ishy Khan are in Derbyshire. A 1930's necklace and a miniature croquet set head to auction, but only after a nighttime rowboat escapade.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Ishy Kahn and Izzie Balmer are on their last legs in the Midlands! Broken pineapples, legless glass ladies, mystery board games and an antique pub table -- what will make them money at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell set off from the Lake District. Expect a portable Victorian loo, a toy lion and three unhappy bears. Plus, the medieval stained glass windows at Carlisle Cathedral and the poet Robert Southey.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell continue their antiquing adventure around the Scottish Borders with food on their mind, picking up a fish service, a sandwich box and a silver kettle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Still in Scotland, experts Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell find rare first edition books, watercolors by local artists and a plate of delicious homemade scones. And the pair take a trip across the water to a Belfast auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Phil Serrell shop in Northern Ireland before an auction in Wales. They uncover a Majolica tea service, Irish fiddle and a bowler hat. A bidding frenzy helps one expert take the win and the Road Trip crown.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects that provide insight into the history of nursing and health care, from medals awarded for bravery to early uniforms, cartoons and medical equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Peeking at some of the Queen Consort's personal items and learning about her favorite charities; finding the purpose of an unusual trio of items, a well-travelled Rolex, and digging up the story of a Ming dynasty bronze left on an Australian beach.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: The team are at Clissold Park in Stoke Newington in the London borough of Hackney, where Will Farmer is charmed by a collection of glitzy items made by Italian designer Piero Fornasetti.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A look at a famous clock collection, a silver honey pot, a photo archive of Sikh worship, a scrap of wood allegedly from the HMS Bounty and a saucy secret hidden inside a pair of bronze owls.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Duncan Campbell discovers a very rare silver tobacco box from the 1600s; Serhat Ahmet examines a porcelain egg with a royal connection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Jon Baddeley checks out a collection of film props and memorabilia from the movie "Blade Runner"; Will Farmer inspects a perspex mermaid sculpture by Arthur Fleischmann.

programme.title: Saints & Sinners

programme.title: Saints & Sinners
programme.desc: Worlds collide when a powerful trio target Mayor Johnson and Jabari; the detectives' clues about Dead Debra lead them right back to where they started, Greater Hope Baptist Church.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: The trip to the Bahamas gets off to a rocky start as the women reflect on their relationships with one another; Dr. Simone arranges a medical mission to inspire the women to come together to help others.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Unresolved issues arise between Mariah and the others; Dr. Heavenly decides not to attend Quad's "Heroes in Healthcare" event; Mariah reveals the real reason why she holds a grudge against Toya, causing the group to question whether she belongs.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Quad has a new baby in her house, while Lisa's got a baby on her brain; Simone and Cecil adjust to life apart; Toya is in big trouble with the IRS; Heavenly stirs things up; Lisa Nicole throws a bash to bring the group together.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Simone reaches out to Quad to make sure she understands why she criticized her; Genise reveals to Toya that she doesn't find Heavenly so heavenly; Lisa takes her complaints about Toya's behavior to her new best friend, Mariah, who throws a party.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Mariah's party ends in a new beef between Genise and Heavenly, and the beginning of the end for Toya and Lisa's friendship; Simone reaches out to family to find her missing father; Jackie tries to convince Curtis to give up the suburbs for the city.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Simone, Quad, and Jackie head to Nashville, Tenn., to search for Simone's missing father; Heavenly does some soul-searching with her spiritual guide, Jewel Tankard; Lisa and Darren seek help from a professional about their relationship.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Heavenly and Lisa Nicole's collaboration turns ugly when Heavenly shares her feelings about Lisa's marriage; Simone returns to work with a trans patient who wants gender reassignment surgery; Jackie's topless charity photo shoot spins out of control.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: The women can't believe Jackie kicked them to the curb; Darren must face the music after flaking on Lisa's baby-making plans; Simone finds out news about her father; Mariah and Quad go head-to-head at Toya's birthday party.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: After their argument at Toya's prom party, Mariah and Quad's friendship is on shaky ground; Quad is planning a birthday bash for Dr. G but doesn't want Mariah to bring her drama to the party; Toya realizes she can no longer afford her lifestyle.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Toya and Eugene must move into a smaller house; Jackie and Curtis' marriage continues to take a backseat to Jackie's career; Mariah and Simone meet to get their friendship back on track; Toya treats the women to a spa day to get ready for Hawaii.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Simone and Cecil head off to Hawaii to celebrate their 20th anniversary with other couples in tow; with Dr. Darren missing in action, Lisa flies solo; Dr. Jackie arrives with some baggage of her own; Mariah starts the trip off on the wrong foot.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Jackie reels from her trip to the Big Island; Dr. Darren still cannot be found; the group bares it all in couples therapy, but the exchange between Lisa and Heavenly proves anything but therapeutic; the group attends a traditional Hawaiian luau.

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: With only a week until their relationship conference, Heavenly and Lisa Nicole must work together to get everything in place; Heavenly learns Lisa hasn't been entirely honest about their collaboration; Quad bares it all at her 35th birthday party.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Toya and Eugene's new accountant wants them to downsize their budget; Jackie springs a romantic surprise on Curtis; tempers flare at Toya's housewarming party as Lisa and Heavenly finally come face to face for the ultimate showdown.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: The women continue to fight at Toya's barbecue, and things turn ugly after Mariah tries to intervene; Heavenly faces a crisis of conscience; Lisa Nicole and Darren try to pick up the pieces; Dr. Jackie's look book is almost ready.

programme.desc: The news of Curtis' infidelity sends shock waves through the group; Eugene takes on extra shifts to pay back the IRS; Quad celebrates the grand opening of Dr. G's new practice; Heavenly plans a special night for Jackie and the others.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: En Kansas ha habido una serie de tornados donde han sido encontrados cuerpos de adolescentes desmembrados. La UAC es llamada para investigar. Mientras, JJ está preocupada, ya que su hijo Henry había estado enfermo y quería estar con él

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un caso se vuelve personal para García cuando la UAC investiga la desaparición de una mujer, en su grupo de apoyo a sobrevivientes, cuya hija desapareció hace siete años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando un altamente clasificado vehículo robotizado llamado Otto causa la muerte de una teniente de la Marina, Gibbs y el equipo analizan si se trata de un suicidio o un homicidio.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs y su equipo se dirigen velozmente a una escena del crimen donde un oficial de inteligencia de alto nivel fue asesinado, descubriendo que el crimen sucedió tres días antes y fue "investigado" por autoridades locales.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Luego de la pérdida de 10 kilogrmos de armas químicas altamente tóxicas, Gibbs y su equipo luchan por localizarlas. El equipo de NCIS se horroriza cuando descubren que las armas químicas están en posesión de un buscado terrorista llamado Mamoun Sharif.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Luego de capturar a un vendedor de armas internacional, el equipo de NCIS descubre que un sistema de armamento altamente clasificado de la Marina está a punto de ser vendido a otro importante contrabandista llamado "La Grenouille" (Armand Assante).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Henry es el testigo clave en el caso de Danny y Baez, su constante intromisión molesta tanto a Danny que termina llevándolos a una pista valiosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante es baleado por un miembro de una banda rival en el patio de su escuela, Danny y Baez intentan controlar la situación para evitar más incidentes, pero el director, Darryl Ward (Ernie Hudson), actúa imprudentemente por su cuenta.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny piensa en aceptar un nuevo trabajo que podría resolver sus problemas financieros después de investigar la muerte de un hombre rico.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un hombre que vivía una doble vida con dos familias. Al mismo tiempo, Anthony lucha con la decisión de ayudar a Erin a investigar a su antiguo compañero, a quien ella sospecha de robar dinero de drogas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño grupo de jóvenes de la academia militar comete un suicidio en masa, la UAC tiene que ver las verdaderas razones detrás de sus actos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga una serie de brutales asesinatos en Filadelfia, lo que los lleva hasta un escenario donde se practica boxeo en busca del asesino. Por otra parte, Hotch conoce a una atractiva atleta, ya que ambos están entrenando para un triatlón.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Star Trek: la película
programme.desc: Cuando un alienígena no identificado destruye tres poderosos cruceros klingon, el capitán James T. Kirk (William Shatner) regresa al U.S.S. Enterprise™ para tomar el mando.

programme.title: Todo Corazón
programme.desc: Basada en el relato de Mariane Pearl sobre la terrible e inolvidable historia de su esposo, el periodista del Wall Street Journal Danny Pearl, su vida y su muerte.

programme.title: Una vida sin terminar
programme.desc: Einar Gilkyson (Robert Redford) vive en una hacienda de Wyoming con su único amigo, Mitch (Morgan Freeman), cuando la mujer a la que culpa por la muerte de su único hijo llega a su puerta sin dinero, desesperada y con una nieta a la que no conocía.

programme.title: El peleador
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, dos hermanos (Mark Wahlberg y Christian Bale), contra todo pronóstico, se unen para entrenar y pelear por un título histórico que podría reunir a su familia fracturada y devolverle el orgullo a su golpeada ciudad.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: La suma de todos los miedos
programme.desc: La tensión entre Oriente y Occidente estalla cuando la CIA sospecha que científicos rusos disidentes están desarrollando más armas nucleares.

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: código sombra
programme.desc: El suspenso no se detiene mientras el recluta de la CIA Ryan queda atrapado en una peligrosa red de intriga y espionaje. Ryan debe pasar de soldado a analista a agente operativo para detener un complot terrorista devastador contra EE. UU.

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)
programme.desc: Bumblebee, un robot herido y destrozado, es encontrado y reparado por una adolescente llamada Charlie. Ambos deberán unir fuerzas para salvar el planeta de los malvados Decepticons en esta aventura llena de acción para toda la familia.

programme.title: El huésped
programme.desc: Cuando un enemigo invisible amenaza a la humanidad al tomar los cuerpos de humanos y borrarles la mente, Melanie Stryder arriesga todo para proteger a la gente que más quiere.

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida
programme.desc: Cuando sus padres desaparecen en busca de la Ciudad Perdida del Oro, Dora se lanza a una trepidante aventura para encontrarlos. Acompaña a Dora y a sus amigos mientras se adentran en la selva, se adelantan a los cazatesoros y desvelan el misterio.

programme.title: El cuartel secreto
programme.desc: Charlie Kincaid descubre un cuartel general secreto debajo de su casa que parece pertenecer a un super héroe. Lo comparte con sus amigos, y ellos empiezan a creer que su padre separado podría tener una doble vida secreta.

programme.title: Bumblebee (ESP)
programme.desc: Bumblebee, un robot herido y destrozado, es encontrado y reparado por una adolescente llamada Charlie. Ambos deberán unir fuerzas para salvar el planeta de los malvados Decepticons en esta aventura llena de acción para toda la familia.

programme.title: Indiana Jones y el templo de la perdicion
programme.desc: En este éxito de taquilla, Indiana Jones debe rescatar a unos niños desaparecidos que han sido secuestrados por terroristas religiosos en Oriente y que, casualmente, están en posesión de unas joyas sagradas robadas.

programme.title: GAMBIT (CBS FILMS)
programme.desc: Harry Deane (Colin Firth) is a man with a plan. Art Curator for media tycoon, Lord Lionel Shabandar (Alan Rickman), Harry devises an elaborate plot to con his abusive boss into purchasing a fake Monet painting.

programme.title: Pootie Tang: luce tu cuerpo y lo gozarás
programme.desc: Cuando la guerra unipersonal de Pootie contra la avaricia, la injusticia y los productos poco saludables comienza a afectar las ganancias de LecterCorp, el demente director ejecutivo logra desmoronarlo, ¡golpeando su cinturón mágico!

programme.title: La chica del tanque
programme.desc: En este divertidísimo thriller futurista, un megavillano (Malcolm McDowell) controla el suministro de agua mundial, y depende de Tank Girl (Lori Petty) y sus escandalosos acompañantes acabar con este avaricioso reinado

programme.title: Dinero fácil
programme.desc: Monty Capuletti (Rodney Dangerfield) bebe, fuma, juega, y come demasiado. Pero cuando su suegra le deja una herencia considerable, solo hay un inconveniente: según el testamento, él debe convertir sus vicios en virtudes antes de poder cobrar.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía?
programme.desc: Leslie Nielsen es Frank Drebin, el policía más "despistado" de las pelis, quien tendrá que detener un plan macabro para asesinar a la reina Isabel II durante una visita a Los Angeles.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía? 2 1/2
programme.desc: Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) adora el misterio. ¿Por qué estamos aquí? ¿Hay vida después del sexo? Sí, aborda los grandes temas, y el más grande es detener a Quentin Hapsburg (Robert Goulet) en su plan para destruir el medio ambiente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: El verano de los peces voladores
programme.desc: Manena va de vacaciones con su padre, Francisco, a una parte del sur de Chile. Ella descubre que la obsesión de su padre por atrapar todos los peces carpa en su laguna artificial está haciendo enojar a la tribu Mapuche local, así que tiene que detenerlo.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos

programme.title: El Infierno

programme.title: Miracle on Christmas
programme.desc: Durante las vacaciones de Navidad, María experimenta pruebas emocionales que le hacen cuestionar su fe hasta que llega un visitante y su marido recibe un milagro inesperado.

programme.title: Novios por navidad
programme.desc: La organizadora de eventos Valeria, traicionada por su amiga Tere que le robó a su prometido, finge un romance con Camilo para vengarse, lo que desemboca en una inesperada historia de amor navideña.

programme.title: Un milagro en el lago de Navidad
programme.desc: Campo de sueños para una nueva generación con un toque navideño. Al lidiar con la tragedia, un adolescente pierde su espíritu alegre. Su viaje se transforma justo a tiempo.

programme.title: Accidente en Navidad
programme.desc: Una pareja que está a punto de divorciarse, se estrella en su avioneta en el bosque. Sus hijos los rescatan y descubren que no fue un accidente. Estar cerca a la muerte les recuerda que todavía se aman.

programme.title: Miracle on Christmas
programme.desc: Durante las vacaciones de Navidad, María experimenta pruebas emocionales que le hacen cuestionar su fe hasta que llega un visitante y su marido recibe un milagro inesperado.

programme.title: Navidad en vivo
programme.desc: Cuando los compañeros de trabajo deciden organizar una fiesta navideña en la oficina, su diversión se convierte en un completo desastre para todos los involucrados.

programme.title: Un milagro en el lago de Navidad
programme.desc: Campo de sueños para una nueva generación con un toque navideño. Al lidiar con la tragedia, un adolescente pierde su espíritu alegre. Su viaje se transforma justo a tiempo.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: La hermandad
programme.desc: Edward Dalton (Ethan Hawke) es investigador en 2019, año en que una plaga convirtió en vampiros a la población. A medida que los humanos se extinguen, los vampiros deben encontrar un sustituto de la sangre. Un hallazgo puede salvar a la humanidad.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins regresa como el Dr. Hannibal Lecter, uno de los asesinos en serie más astutos y temidos del mundo, que reaparece después de una década para jugar con la agente del FBI Clarice Starling (Julianne Moore).

programme.title: Guerra mundial Z
programme.desc: Guerra Mundial Z es una acelerada epopeya de lo que podrían ser los últimos días de la raza humana. El ex colaborador de la ONU Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) es llamado para ayudar a acabar con la caótica pandemia que se extiende por el mundo.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Yo, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Adam, un monstruo creado por Frankenstein, se da cuenta de que su verdadera misión es salvar a la humanidad después de encontrarse en medio de una guerra entre dos clanes inmortales de demonios y gárgolas.

programme.title: The Big Sombrero
programme.desc: Gene heads South in a fiesta of melody and a jamboree of romance. He fights for the right of rancheros to live on their rancho. Outlaws fear him and senoritas cheer him, and his famous horse Champion.

programme.title: Riders Of The Whistling Pines
programme.desc: Gene Autry believes he has accidentally shot a man, but learns that the guilt lies with men trying to stop a destructive moth infestation. Will modern chemicals be used to save the day, against Gene?

programme.title: The Return Of A Man Called Horse
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in this superior sequel which follows the plight of a horribly wronged tribe of Sioux Indians and the white man who would join in their revenge.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: In this powerful tale of courage, determination, and the pioneering spirit that defined an era, a young woman bravely sets out with her children in tow to claim a homestead - and a brand new life - in the untamed West after her husband is killed.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: Run For Cover
programme.desc: Ex-criminal in the old days of the West teaches a woman the ways of love and a boy the art of courage.

programme.title: Man With The Gun
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: Invaders From Mars
programme.desc: In the early 1950s, Cold War tensions and the burgeoning space race created a heady mix of paranoia and unbridled creativity as filmmakers speculated as to the marvels - and horrors - that lay beyond the stars.

programme.title: It! The Terror From Beyond Space
programme.desc: The survivor of a space expedition claims his crew was killed by an alien creature. The rescue captain dismisses the explanation only to find that a creature has stowed away on the spacecraft and begins to hunt the human hosts.

programme.title: When Worlds Collide
programme.desc: An impending collision with a runaway star signals the destruction of Earth. As doomsday approaches, people race against time and the panic of those who will be left behind.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: What's New Pussycat?
programme.desc: Peter Sellers, Peter O'Toole and Woody Allen star in this wacky chapter from the swinging '60s where therapy becomes hilarity

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient
programme.desc: Peter Sellers stars as a hilariously seedy concert pianist who is nearly driven mad after he becomes the obsession of two crush-crazed schoolgirls in this poignant, funny look at innocence lost. Angela Lansbury and Paula Prentiss also star.

programme.title: After The Fox
programme.desc: Pretending to be a movie director, an Italian crook known as The Fox (Peter Sellers) cons local villagers and the police into smuggling into Rome the loot from a $3 million Cairo bullion robbery...as part of the film script!

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude recruits Vivian into women's liberation and possible out of her marriage. Arthur takes a dim view of anything that might keep Vivian away from her 'daily chores' and warns her that her 'revolutionary' attitude may be destroying their marriage.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Mrs. Naugatuck's strange behavior worries the Findlays until she tells them she's in love and plans to get married. Maude plans a surprise bridal shower for Mrs. Naugatuck, but there's an even bigger surprise in store for everyone.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: What price pride? Even though bankruptcy is breathing down Walter's neck, he'd rather lose his business than allow Maude to mortgage the house -- which is in her name.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar loses money in a poker game and when he can't pay the debt in cash, he donates Felix's band, the Sophisticados, to Billie Joe as payment instead.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar learns the park where he and his cronies played baseball is going to be the site for an office building, Oscar becomes civic-minded and decides to run for city councilman.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Singer-composer Paul Williams is the special guest star in this episode written especially for him. Felix Unger's daughter has a crush on Williams and runs away from home to follow him wherever he appears.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix discovers that his father and Oscar's knew each other in the old days and that Oscar's father was responsible for Felix's father's downfall.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When the boys continue to ask Bub for help with their homework, he realizes he does not have all the answers. He decides to go to night school for further education. He meets another student, and they both make up stories about their lives.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Chip runs away from home after feeling neglected, but when he gets downtown, he realizes home is safer.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: While on a camping trip vacation without the other family members, Steve is matched to another camper by an older couple who loves to play matchmakers. Both Steve and Fran are initially reluctant.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie each have dates the same night. Due to a mix up in names, Mike picks up Robbie's young date (Trudi Ames), and Robbie picks up an older woman (Carole Costello), meant for Mike.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob has to find a television set to watch a TV show for Alan Brady.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Sally and Buddy learn that Alan Brady is cutting down his writing staff.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A film crew takes over the Petrie house during Mille and Jerry's wedding anniversary party.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The 'The Alan Brady Show' writing staff realizes they've sent Alan a script without first removing their insults.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe becomes a fight promoter when he meets up with a young local plumber with the size and strength of a gorilla.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A week in New York City transforms Betty Jo from a country girl into a svelte sophisticate.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe's, arch-enemy of the Hooterville Cannonball, returns to Hooterville Valley in adject disgrace and poverty.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: One of Kate's old flames pays a visit,but his efforts to rekindle their romance are thwarted by his dominating sister.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe becomes the new postmaster of Hooterville and moves the post office to the Shady Rest hotel.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Joe enters a contest sponsored by Gibney's Old English Tomato Sauce and wins first prize-an English butler.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer befriends a couple who claim Camp Henderson is on their land.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's cooking skills might get him assigned to the kitchen permanently.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A drug kingpin guns down a cop. To ensure a conviction, a narcotics officer who witnessed the murder will have to reveal in court a closely guarded personal secret that could cost him friendships and his standing in the department.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young man named Clifton Ross (Mart Hulswit), the son of an aircraft magnate (David Brian), awakens after a night of drinking to find a bandage on his hand, blood on his shirt, and fragmentary memories of a fight with his girlfriend Doreen (Janaire).

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: While on a helicopter Mannix sees a woman with a man choking her. When he gets to the place, they deny anything has happened. Mannix has few leads and no police cooperation (they don't believe him) until a woman appears with her own story.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is brought to a small town in New Mexico on a ruse, and then subpoenaed to testify as an expert witness for the prosecution in a murder trial.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A jeweler whose shop is located near Mannix' detective agency is murdered, and in the crowd outside the murder scene, Mannix runs into Bill Chase, a buddy from his days in the Korean War.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A man supplying secrets to an investigative reporter is murdered in the desert by the hired henchman of a crooked land developer. Barnaby is hired to investigate to get to the bottom of it, but not before another murder is committed.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A grieving widow asks Barnaby to look into the death of her charter pilot husband who died on a run. During the investigation Barnaby and J. R. discover a family operated money smuggling ring with a black sheep son stealing from them.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby and J.R. investigate a scuba diving death that seems unlikely to have happened the way it was reported. What they discover is more death and over $1,000,000 in jade art objects at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby, J.R., and Betty investigate a 10 year old kidnapping case after a man identifying himself as Scorpio calls a family offering to return his long lost daughter in exchange for a $250,000 ransom.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Jackie Cooper guest stars as Dr. Alex Southmore, who becomes a suspect in the investigation of his wife's murder when McGarrett finds holes in the confessed killer's story.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett receives calls and clues from a man saying he will kill somebody important in 48 hours. His only clue to the identity of the victim: a key sent by the anonymous assailant.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett fears a gangland war is imminent when it seems a mainland syndicate is trying to take over criminal operations. Criminal operations up to this time have been under the control of four unfriendly families.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A syndicate boss seeks revenge when his light-heavyweight boxer's hand is smashed by a punchy ex-fighter. McGarrett and his Five-O team desperately search for the punchy attacker, not only to bring him to justice but also, to protect him from the mobster.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett searches for an ecology fanatic whose pranks are harmless until he threatens the lives of those he feels are the cause of the island's pollution. The islanders are sympathetic to the prankster — until he carries out his threat of murder.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: As Hunter and McCall investigate a string of jewelry store robberies, they pursue the thieves in an alley and McCall shoots a man who may be innocent.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve responds to a call where earlier a man chased another man out of a store with a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker breaks in a new partner while protecting Alex from an ex-sheriff turned prisoner who blames Alex for putting him in jail and seeks revenge.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker fears he may have to take down an old friend in town from Japan, knowing the man has ties to the Japanese mob.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker races to catch an ATM robber with a bounty hunter who's better known for bringing in his capture more dead than alive.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker's partner goes undercover and gets sent to prison. But the bus never makes it when a hurricane blows into Texas and Walker follows the escapees to a remote hotel where only the owners and a special friend still remain.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: When fellow workers at a labor camp nickname Richard Kimble Doc it prompts three criminals, who have kidnapped a boy, to draft him into service when the boy is hurt.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble is forced to defy hurricane warnings to transport a couple from the mainland to the Florida Keys.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble happens to be in the background when a sidewalk photographer snaps some newlyweds and it leads to concentrated trouble.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver inherits a vintage car and a whole lot of trouble when his grandfather passes away.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to East Berlin in search of a friend’s lost granddaughter.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After testifying against him in his bid for freedom, MacGyver becomes the target of an escaped mass murderer.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Henry tells Dennis to get rid of his massive comic book collection, so he decides to sell them.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: While Henry is out of town, Dennis tries to take his place and do everything his father would do.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: When Mr. Wilson's Aunt Emma pays him a visit, she takes an instant liking to Dennis, causing Mr. Wilson to fear that she will make Dennis her heir instead of him.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis tries to fix up his Grandpa Perkins with Miss Cathcart.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: A Day in the Country
programme.desc: The Andersons decide to take a weekend family drive in the country only to have their car break down.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Bud Branches Out
programme.desc: Bud develops a crush on his attractive French professor.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Gardener's Big Day
programme.desc: The Anderson's Hispanic gardener is chosen to represent Springfield at the opening of a park but a couple of town council members are less than thrilled with the prospect.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Imposter
programme.desc: Betty gets involved with a young lawyer who's posing as the owner of a radio store.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: When the twins find out that Mr. French's birthday is approaching, they ask Cissy to help them set up a birthday party for Mr. French.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: The twins make friends with a boy who does not have any parents and has run away from an orphanage. They hid him in the apartment, moving him from room to room, so the others do not find him.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: When Bill is in Hong Kong for business, he works with Ng Ho. Bill is impressed with Ng Ho and invites him to visit New York. When Ng Ho stays with the Davis' he starts to help around the apartment, too efficiently and upsets Mr. French.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Uncle Bill and Mr. French take the twins on vacation to Boston while Cissy spends her vacation time in New York. Everyone seems to be off-sync as they miss each other.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Bradys are cast for a laundry soap commercial.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg cracks a rib while trying out for the football team.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike and Carol receive disturbing news of an eyewitness account that Jan stole someone else's bicycle from the park.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby develops a Napoleon complex, especially after Greg has to save him from a situation caused in part because he ended up doing something he wasn't supposed to since he was too small to handle the job.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg loses a bet to Bobby and has to be his slave for a week.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter writes a newspaper column to win points with his teacher.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While driving Munson's cab, Archie saves the life of a beautiful woman who becomes unconscious. Uh, was that a woman? Sorry, that was no woman, thanks to female impersonator Beverly LaSalle's convincing act.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike - along with everyone else - debate where he should be when Gloria is in the delivery room giving birth to their baby.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie rips up a chain letter, thinking it to be nothing more than baloney. Then a whole bunch of accidents happen. Coincidence or did Archie really set off the string of mishaps?

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Gloria gets her paycheck in the mail, it is good news and bad news. The good news is that the check is more than she expected. The bad news is that the check also comes enclosed with a pink slip.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is unhappy with Edith doing volunteer work at The Sunshine home for seniors and he demands she quit.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's company physical is fast approaching, and he needs to remain calm for an entire weekend for the blood pressure test. Of course, a variety of situations arise that test Archie's ability to keep an even temper.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria, now in her seventh month, is feeling unattractive. Added to that is the fact that Mike is tutoring an attractive young woman in Economics and suspects that something else might be going on.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Mike argue over the religious upbringing of baby Joey during a Thanksgiving Day dinner.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's son Vint and his two children stop by to do some laundry. But while there, Vint ends up revealing that he has gotten evicted and they need a place to stay. Mama tells them they can move in with her.

programme.title: La Bayadere
programme.desc: The Paris Opera Ballet performs the work choreographed by Rudolf Nureyev.

programme.title: Descent Into the Maelstrom
programme.desc: In the 1980s, Philip Glass creates music for the Australian Dance Theatre based on "Descent into the Maelstrom" by Edgar Allan Poe.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Grieg's Piano Concerto & Beethoven Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Conductor Jan Latham-Koenig leads the Flanders Symphony Orchestra in a concert recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium; Felix Mendelssohn's concert overture Die Hebrides, Op. 26; Edvard Grieg's Piano Concerto in A minor, Op. 16.

programme.title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 9 in D Minor, Op. 125
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Philippe Jordan and the Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris recorded all of Ludwig van Beethoven's symphonies in 2014-2015. In this program, maestro Jordan presents Beethoven's final symphony: Symphony No. 9 in D minor, Op. 125.

programme.title: Fiesta del Tango
programme.desc: For the audience in the famous ballroom El Palacio in Buenos Aires, the year 2012 began with tango rhythms and Argentinean folk music.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Symphonies Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Herbert Blomstedt conducts the Gewandhausorchester; recorded in Leipzig's Gewandhaus.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 5 in C Minor, Op. 67
programme.desc: Les Dissonances perform Ludwig van Beethoven's Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67 at Philharmonie de Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Chopin: Piano Concertos No. 1 & No. 2
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21; soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin.

programme.title: Mozart Clarinet Concerto in A Major
programme.desc: Belgian clarinettist Geert Baeckelandt performs with Casco Phil, under the baton of Benjamin Haemhouts.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun. John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. Today, a dater must choose between men whose baggage includes dumping girlfriends via text message and having 250 unicorn figurines.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A boy's toy Batmobile car provides an important clue for detectives struggling to make a case against a serial killer who stalks and kills waitresses.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A 23-year-old teacher vanished the evening before Easter after giving confession. Her body was later found floating in a drainage canal. At the time, a key witness hinted that a member of the Catholic clergy may have been responsible.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A 14-year-old boy is charged with the murder of his sister, but his public defender believes the real killer is still on the loose. And two deteriorated slides, made 16 years earlier, give police the evidence they need to reopen the cold case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A man suspected of the cold case murder of his wife and son hatches a new plot to kill his mother and father; and detectives solve the 20-year-old murder of a teenager by tricking her killer into licking an envelope.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a Nevada couple demands the return of a baby they had sold to another couple, the burned body of the baby turns up in Arizona. Then, a man discovers a barrel in his crawlspace that contains the body of a woman who has been dead for decades.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: My Next Life as a Villainess: All Routes Lead to Doom! X
programme.desc: Following Catarina's kidnapping, the first prince, Jeffrey Stuart, tells Susanna of his love for his younger brothers; Geordo and Alan reminisce about their childhood days with their older brothers.

programme.title: My Next Life as a Villainess: All Routes Lead to Doom! X
programme.desc: Geordo invites Catarina to his family vacation home during summer vacation, but much to his annoyance, Alan has also invited their friends over as well.

programme.title: My Next Life as a Villainess: All Routes Lead to Doom! X
programme.desc: Raphael Wolt, an employee at the Department of Magic, welcomes Catarina and her friends for a tour of the facility; Lana leads them in an experiment on a magic tool she recently acquired from an antiquarian: a so-called wish-granting doll house.

programme.title: My Next Life as a Villainess: All Routes Lead to Doom! X
programme.desc: Nicol makes the decision to go through with an arranged marriage; although he meets many prospective partners, all he can think about while talking to them is Catarina, so none of them get past the first meeting.

programme.title: My Next Life as a Villainess: All Routes Lead to Doom! X
programme.desc: Catarina admits to Keith that she doesn't want to marry Geordo; Catarina receives a note from Keith saying he has run away.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre la muerte de un veterano de la Segunda Guerra Mundial se detuvo por completo cuando el sospechoso principal tenía una cortada sólida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Post preparó un baño para su esposa antes de salir a correr. Regresó y la encontró sin respirar. Murió antes de que llegara la ambulancia. La policía consideró su muerte como accidental hasta que surgió un motivo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer había sido agredida sexualmente, apuñalada repetidamente y dada por muerta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía de Virginia Beach llegó al departamento de Makdessi para encontrar los cuerpos ensangrentados de Elise Makdessi y de Quincy Brown, un soldado de la Marina. ¿Pero era el amante de Elise o su agresor?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba practicando tiros en un hermoso día de primavera, Martin Dillon es asesinado con disparos. Su amigo sostiene que fue un extraño accidente, pero se necesitan más de 20 años para que la verdad salga a la luz.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante 15 meses, un asesino en serie estranguló a prostitutas en Florida y luego se burló de la policía dejando los cuerpos a la vista. Las únicas pistas fueron una huella de neumático y algunos hilos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Noticia de última hora
programme.desc: Una joven productora de noticias de televisión es violada y asesinada en su apartamento. La policía identifica a dos sospechosos, pero ambos son absueltos de cualquier delito.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante
programme.desc: Los asesinatos de una pareja de ancianos dejan a la policía perpleja hasta que, dos años después, reciben un gran alivio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino cereal
programme.desc: Cuando un incendio destruyó la mayor parte de una casa y un niño desapareció, la policía organizó la búsqueda más grande en la historia de su pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begins tonight at Valley Ranch! The stress for the newly selected training camp candidates is evident as they struggle to re-arrange their schedules and secure new living arrangements in Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's a tense time for all and Training Camp Candidates who are not DCC ready will be exposed at the first and only field rehearsal on the Cowboys Stadium turf.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man from Iowa is shot to death while sleeping in bed next to his fiancée; coincidences and quick thinking lead to surprising information regarding the killer's motive.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After being severely beaten in her own home, a high school girl goes under hypnosis to try to identify her attacker.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Rachel Buffett, whose former fiancé, Daniel Wozniak, was convicted of two grisly murders, talks about being at the center of the investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A doctor ingests a lethal chemical, causing friends to wonder if it was an attempt at suicide or if he was poisoned -- until a love triangle is uncovered.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: I Love New York: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: New York must eliminate 5 men, but it's not that easy. At a pre-elimination cocktail party, things heat up as the men drink too much, fight and even bribe others to win over New York.

programme.title: I Love New York: Flowers from Fishburne
programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Stolen Date
programme.desc: With 12 guys left, some of the boys play a prank on a few of the less popular men that keeps them up all night.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nobody Likes a Snitch
programme.desc: New York has barely wiped the morning out of her eyes when a fight breaks out between two of her boys. Although NY can be a tolerant person, violence is non-negotiable and she is faced with the tough decision to let a guy go.

programme.title: I Love New York: Blood Oath Gone Bad
programme.desc: After snitching, fighting, and spitting, and nearly getting eliminated, one man is the house enemy and anxiously waits for an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nip/Suck
programme.desc: New York surprises the guys with the return of one man. Another man is unhappy as his world is suddenly turned upside down and he literally fears for his life.

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York
programme.desc: New York invites the remaining six guys' exes to the house and this time, there's a special twist involved. She's bringing two of HER exes, Chance and Real, to help dig up some dirt on her guys.

programme.title: I Love New York: Mind Games
programme.desc: With 5 guys left, New York wants to find out who's the most compatible with her and who's just plain crazy, when she takes the boys for a psych test.

programme.title: I Love New York: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: With only four guys left, it's time to clean house, literally. New York has invited some special guests-the guy's parents, so she gets her boys to scour and scrub her house for their arrival.

programme.title: I Love New York: Miami Thrice
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final three men to pack their bags because they're heading to Miami!

programme.title: I Love New York: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30-minute special episode, NY hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite guys from the series.

programme.title: I Love New York: Rasta Finale
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a tense elimination in Miami, it's down to New York's final two suitors. They accompany New York to the tropics of Jamaica for the final showdown.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Old man Oscar Hemmings is being wheeled into surgery. As he is pushed through the halls, he has his lawyer, Mr. Bendix, take the names of doctors and workers in the hallway.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Journalist Ellen Sharp is meeting Phil Gwynn at a nightclub; apparently, he has a big scoop for her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: From the statues of Rameses II to the final flourishes under Queen Cleopatra, Sooke discovers that the subsequent invasions by foreign rulers, from the Nubians and Alexander the Great to the Romans, produced a new hybrid art full of surprise.

programme.title: Secrets of the Pyramids
programme.desc: Exploring fresh archaeological excavations that shed new light on the lives of those who worked tirelessly on the pyramids.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unpredictable world, the ancient powers must lay down the foundations of their societies to show their strength, protect their people and ultimately build their way to glory.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke tells the story of Ancient Egyptian art and how it reflected the civilisation's religion, through thirty extraordinary masterpieces.

programme.title: Treasures of Ancient Egypt
programme.desc: Alastair Sooke explores the sumptuous treasures of the Golden Age of Egyptian art, starting with troubling psychological portraits of tyrant king Senwosret III, and ending with the golden mask of boy-king Tutankhamun.

programme.desc: The barn-find '56 Ford's new "fauxtina" conceals the heart of a muscle car.

programme.desc: The Doctor is in a coma and Sarah is held prisoner in the spiders' larder.

programme.desc: The Silurian's infect Major Baker with a virus and release him to spread the infection.

programme.desc: As the parallel world faces destruction, the Doctor is desperate to return to his world.

programme.desc: The Master is broadcasting an activation signal to open a channel for the Nestenes.
